college_info.intro:
Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University offers popular programmes such as BTech, MBBS and BSc. The University offers these courses based on merit and entrance and candidates can apply for admission through the official website of DSU.
Furthermore, the University offers these courses with a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12 and through the qualification of accepted scores of NEET and other eligible exams. The fee structure of all the courses also includes a tuition fee varying from INR 3 Lakh to INR 8 Lakh, depending on the level of the course opted for. The placement record of DSU marked the placement visit of 250 recruiters who offered 3K jobs for the graduates. Given below are more details about the DSU popular programmes:

Apart from this, DSU offers courses in Pharma from the constituent Institute of Pharmacy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Worth and value for money.

review_content.Placements: 97% percentage of students are placed in our college. The top international companies are recruiting from our college. 98% of students got internships from my courses with the highest package. The top roles are offered in my courses. The average package offered in my course is 70k per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my courses are superb. We have Mac labs and excellent classrooms through smart learning. Free Wi-Fi all over campus, 60k + books are available in our Library. Our hostel is so good. Food is amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with Cyber Security - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the teaching.

review_content.Placements: The salary package is above 50,000 for cybersecurity analysis, pentester, vulnerabilities accessor, etc. roles. Some companies visit our college to offer placements to students. Most of the recruiting companies are agencies. Our college doesn't provide internships, so students have to find off-campus. The salary package offered is 2 LPA to 2.4 LPA. Our college provides fewer placements to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: A wonderful environment is available. Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are labs, classrooms, and libraries. Wi-Fi is not provided in the college and hostel. There is no proper mobile network. Hostels don't serve different food for students from different states.

admission_overview.college_name: Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University Perambalur Course Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University offers courses at UG and PG levels such as BSc, BTech, BHA, BSc and MBA. Admission to both the courses is entrance and merit-based. Candidates interested in applying to any courses must register for entrance exams and appear for the same and in case of merit-based exam they can apply on the official website . To know more information related to Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University admission 2025, go through the below sections:

Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University admission 2025 is open. The college carries out an online mode of application for all the courses. The college offers BTech and MSc at the UG and PG levels. Admission to BTech/B.E. is based on merit and for admission to MBBS., the college accepts NEET scores. Check the below table forDhanalakshmi Srinivasan University courseeligibility & selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Merit-based
Merit-based

Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University admission process 2025 is open for all courses. The institute offers merit-based admission to its UG and PG courses. Candidates must complete the admission process for admission. Check below theDhanalakshmi Srinivasan University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University Application Process 2025
Candidates looking for admission to Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University in any course are required to apply on the official website of the institute.
Step 2: Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University Selection Round
Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University admission is based on the merit exam for all the courses.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission
Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round must pay the Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University fee to lock in the final seats.

placement_data.title: Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University Perambalur Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the highest during Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University placements 2024 stood at INR 15.5 LPA . More than 250 recruiters visited the University and offered over 3,000 jobs to the students of the batch 2024 . The top recruiters of Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University in 2024 included Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro, HCL, CMS, Genpact, MRF, Vodafone, TVS, L&T, etc.
Note : The placement year is not mentioned on the official website. Hence, the placement data mentioned above are assumed for 2024 .

Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan University has a placement cell responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The University invites companies of various sectors to conduct the Campus interview process at the University premises. The placed students also get the opportunity to do their final project in the placed company as interns with a stipend at this phase. After successful completion of the internship, the students can get full-time employment.

college_info.intro:
The BTech and MBA programmes are among the most popular offerings at Apeejay Institute of Management & Engineering Technical Campus. AIMETC BTech students are placed among the top companies such as Nutanix, ThoughtWorks, AIVOT, Tiger Analytics, Capgemini India, NRIFT (Nomura), SalesForce, and many more. The college offers the BTech programme in several branches such as BTech (Computer Science Engineering), BTech-CSE (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning), and BTech-CSE (Internet of Things and Cyber Security including BlockChain Technology). reviews_list.review_title: Review of MBA course admission in the year 2026 in Punjab.

review_content.Placements: Almost 84% of our MBA class students get placed. The average package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.8 LPA. The highest package is 14 LPA. Asian Paints, Deloitte, Infosys, and HDFC Bank are the top recruiting companies for our course. Approximately 70% of students secured internships at ICICI Bank, Reliance, and KPMG. Roles offered are business consultant, HR executive, financial analyst, and marketing manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library has good case studies but few new journals. Classrooms are modern with projectors. Although occasionally paced. The hostel rooms are good. The canteen is far superior to the monotonous mess food. There are good sports facilities, but the gym is old.

reviews_list.review_title: College provides good education and is very disciplined.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students got placed at good package through our college. The highest salary package offered ranges from 8 LPA - 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Companies like TCL, HDFC, Amazon, etc., visit our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is also very good. There is Wi-Fi in every corner and we also well-maintained computer labs. Classrooms are also very nice. Library is also very good. Canteen has everything available. Medical facilities are also amazing.

overview_faqs.question: How is the college life of outstation students at Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus?
overview_faqs.answer: Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus is spread over a sprawling campus of about 4.0 acres on the Rama Mandi, Hoshiarpur Road, consisting of a four-storied main building, modern four-storied hostel accommodation, Director’s residence and a guest house. The campus comprises modern lecture theatres, air-conditioned conference hall, state-of-the-art Physics Lab, Chemistry Lab, Mechanical Workshop and Computer Centre with 549 computers along with the latest software and round-the-clock internet access. The campus provides blanket wireless service (Wi-Fi) in the Institute and hostels with internet speed of 382Mbps. The air-conditioned, fully automated Library boasts of 25112 books, 57 national & international journals/magazines & 18 newspapers, and Internet access. DELNET database for resource sharing purpose has also been provided in the Library. The staff and students can also access e-journals using DELNET and J-gate databases. individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MBA course information about placement, facilities, faculty, etc.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of the students were placed. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, the highest is 14 LPA, and the average is about 6.8 LPA. Deloitte, ICICI, Infosys, and TCS were among the companies that came. Many were able to secure internships at consultancies and banks. Drawback, fewer offers from overseas.
content.Infrastructure: The campus features a good library, computer labs, smart classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel's amenities are good, but the food in the mess could be better. Sports facilities are good, and there is some medical assistance, but it is not very sophisticated.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MBA Course Admission in 2025-26.

content.Placements: Overall, it was a worthwhile educational experience for me to complete my MBA here. Nearly 85% of students were placed, which is a very good placement rate. The average CTC was close to 6 LPA, while the highest CTC was around 14 LPA. Large recruiters with positions in marketing, finance, human resources, and consulting, including Deloitte, Infosys, HDFC, and Reliance, came to visit. Although some students ended up in smaller companies, internships were also respectable.
content.Infrastructure: The campus feature a library with a large collection of case studies, Wi-Fi, and classrooms with projectors. Overall, hostel life was comfortable, though the mess food could get monotonous at times. Sports and fitness facilities helped students maintain their equilibrium.

admission_overview.college_name: AIMETC Courses Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: AIMETC also known asApeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campusoffers various courses inEngineering, Management and Computer Application. Admission to all the courses is merit-based. Further, admission toMBAAIMETCacceptsCMAT and MATscores and forBTechcourses, candidates need to appear forcounselling roundrespectively. Interested candidates are required to apply for admissiononline and offlineby visiting theofficial websiteorvisiting the campus physically. The following segments are all the information related to theApeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus admission, course eligibility, and selection criteria.

AIMETC admission 2025is open. The institute carried out anonline and offlinemode of application for all the courses. AIMETC offers various UG and PG courses such asBCom, BBA, MBA, MCAand others. Admission to all the courses ismerit-basedexceptBTech and MBA. For admission to BTech candidates need to appear in thecounselling roundand for MBA, the institute acceptsCMAT and MATfor admission. Check outApeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus courseeligibility & selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
B.E. / B.Tech
Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects
Merit-Based+ Counselling
Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board
Merit-Based
Graduation degree from a recognised board
Graduation degree and Class 10 and Class 12 with Mathematics as a subject
Merit-Based
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for more AIMETC courses

AIMETC admission process 2025is merit and entrance-based. Further, for BTech, candidates are required to appear for a counselling round. After filling out the eligibility and selection criteria candidates need to apply online and offline for admission. Checkout the following steps for a detailed Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus admission process 2025:
Step 1: AIMETC Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission to any courses at Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus must submit an application form. To fill out the application form candidates can apply online or by visiting the institute campus.
Step 2: AIMETC Selection Round

As part of the selection process, the candidate must qualify CMAT and MAT exams for admission to MBA. Further, for BTech candidates need to appear in the counselling round. Additionaly, for all other courses institute offers admission based on the last qualifying score.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment
Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus releases a merit list of selected candidates for final seat allotment.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
The candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round must pay course fees within the given dates to lock their seats.

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #37 in the Times 2025 under the Management Institutes category. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus rankings:

hostel.description:
The campus has two three-storey hostels, one each for boys and girls with an intake capacity of 75 students per hostel. Each hostel has a Resident Warden with supporting staff. These hostels have separate well furnished common rooms, guest rooms, sick rooms and amenities. Students will get Wi-Fi/hot water/Radiant cooling system/Washing machine/Uninterrupted power supply , separate Generator for Students/Medical facility/ Open Air Theater/Well equipped Gym/Indoor & outdoor games as hostel facility.
No. of rooms has distributed as following:
For Girls: 
- Single Room (Non AC) : 12 
- For Dormitory (Non AC): 46
- For Dormitory (AC) : 2

For Boys:
- For Single Room (Non AC) : 15
- For Dormitory (Non AC): 31
- For Dormitory (AC) : 2

library.description: The Technical Campus Library, grown into an impressive resource centre of knowledge, is worthy of providing all relevant data and information pertaining to various disciplines such as social sciences, psychology, economics, general management, finance, accounts, production, operations management, marketing, trade & commerce, including international trade, business laws, taxation, strategic management, information technology, mass communication. The library is fully air-conditioned, spacious and has more than 22589 books.The library provieds online information access DELNET and OPAC service for the students and staffs.

reviews.review_heading: MBA course information about placement, facilities, faculty, etc.
reviews.review_text: The campus features a good library, computer labs, smart classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel's amenities are good, but the food in the mess could be better. Sports facilities are good, and there is some medical assistance, but it is not very sophisticated.

reviews.review_heading: MBA Course Admission in 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: The campus feature a library with a large collection of case studies, Wi-Fi, and classrooms with projectors. Overall, hostel life was comfortable, though the mess food could get monotonous at times. Sports and fitness facilities helped students maintain their equilibrium.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MBA course admission in the year 2026 in Punjab.
reviews.review_text: The library has good case studies but few new journals. Classrooms are modern with projectors. Although occasionally paced. The hostel rooms are good. The canteen is far superior to the monotonous mess food. There are good sports facilities, but the gym is old.

reviews.review_heading: College provides good education and is very disciplined.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is also very good. There is Wi-Fi in every corner and we also well-maintained computer labs. Classrooms are also very nice. Library is also very good. Canteen has everything available. Medical facilities are also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Apeejay Institute of Management and Engineering Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: It provides Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are very good, clean, and ventilated with air conditioning. The library is huge, and many books related to our courses are available. The quality of hostel rooms and food is average. The mess and canteen need improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college. College life is great.
reviews.review_text: The college has every basic facility needed like labs, modern classrooms, etc. It provides highly equipped and modern labs with advanced applications. The speed of the Wi-Fi facility is pretty great. Classrooms are spacious and of great quality here. The food served in a mess is great. I have lived at places, but the food served is exceptional here.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent placements 2021.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is excellent. The campus is well connected with a Wi-Fi facility. Smart classrooms with air conditioner. Books of foreign authors available, labs are well connected with Wi-Fi, Single computer for a single student. The hostel is adjoining to the campus, clean rooms, healthy food at reasonable prices. Sports facilities are normal.

reviews.review_heading: College and faculty members are amazing.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered in the college premises are awesome such as Wi-Fi, medical facilities, hostel facilities, sports club, amazing food at the mess, library with top-class management books and others. There are smart classrooms, and students are allowed to use technology while studying.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Laptops, computers, Wi-Fi signals, Library, online examination, classrooms, hostel etc. are available. Hostel facilities as I heard from my hostler friends were below average. Wi-Fi signals and computer labs were above average. Each and every classroom is having projector and white boards.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for studies and placements.
reviews.review_text: All labs are well-maintained and clean. The library is also well-maintained, and all type of books are available in the library. Classrooms are also well-maintained and clean. Food served in the canteen is good. Strong Wi-Fi facility is available in labs. All labs are highly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, placements, and events.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are 8 labs with approximately 200 computers and proper Wi-Fi facility is provided to every college student and faculty. Even you can issue laptops for college work. There are fully air-conditioned classrooms, labs and canteens. Every classroom has projectors and a proper sound system. In our library, there are daily 20 newspapers along with many magazines. Even many books are available to help students in their subjects, along with extra knowledge. I haven't used hostel, bu...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is enabled with 24 hours Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors for PPTs and air-conditioned. The library is also accessed online and offering more than four lacs books to read. The hostel is good, and they have charged very less amount. But the food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Soaring high is its nature. Helps in building up the best by creating the Best version of yourself.
reviews.review_text: The campus is facilitated with high-speed Wi-Fi for staff and students. An updated computer lab, a huge library with nearly 28000 books, a medical room and an encouraging sporting faculty adds up to the good stars of the college. The labs and rooms are all air conditioned through solar panels. The hostel rooms are well maintained with hygienic food. The canteen also offers best food to satisfy your appetite.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching provided in the college is the best. Placements, infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Apeejay Institute of Management Technical Campus has 6 buildings. Each building is 3-storeyed. Labs are well-equipped and air-conditioned. Classrooms are well maintained. Washrooms are clean. Proper supply of electricity and drinking water are available. There are separate hostels for boys and girls with proper mess facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of  APJ Institute of Management Technical Campus. A good college which could get better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. The college is having a range of facilities like library, computer lab, and reading room. The college also has a dedicated placement cell and student enquiry office for good preparation of the students. Although the campus is not very big, it should have been big. It feels a little clumsy.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Oxford Engineering College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Oxford Engineering College offers M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fees for Oxford Engineering College courses range between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the placements. Faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in this college. The management is not even trying to provide it. It is a bad thing in college. A placement cell is available, but they do nothing for us. If get placed through off-campus drives held in other colleges, they will put your photo in their achievements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. A library is available but has only old books. They say that the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but it is not. Hostel rooms are okay to stay in. Food provided there is a major problem. Breakfast provided is the food cooked last night. Major machines are present in the college, but the fact is that they are not working.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: An average college, the worst placements, and average classes.

review_content.Placements: The placements in our college are the worst. The college doesn't provide placements to many students. Only one company visits the college, but it is not a good company. The salaries offered are very low. The training provided is average.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is bad. The lab equipment and instruments don't work properly. The college provided only 3 buses for transport, in the cities. The college environment is poor. The strength of students is decreased in our college. Overall, it is an average college.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is not a good for your career.

content.Placements: No placement was provided in any company. Passed out students were very less. Don't waste time joining this college. Internships are very less. The salary offered is very low at Rs. 6,000 per month. The life of pass out students and their carrier got worst by joining this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good enough for engineering college. Wi-Fi was not available. Labs, libraries and classrooms on the campus were good. The hostel was the worst. A room had to be shared by six students. The food served was good. Other facilities provided were also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: There are good faculty members. There are poor facilities.

content.Placements: There are almost zero placements in our course. The salary offered for the other department students is Rs. 9,000 per month. Cognizant is the top recruiter. Programmer analyst trainee is the role offered. None of the students got internships while I was studying in our course.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. There is a good library, but it is of no use as teachers do not give free time. There are goods labs. But there is no good canteen. I don't know about the hostel because I was a day scholar. Facility wise, it is not bad. But not good interiors in the hostel. They encourage some sports, and students' skills were good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the placements. Faculty members are good.

content.Placements: There are no placements in this college. The management is not even trying to provide it. It is a bad thing in college. A placement cell is available, but they do nothing for us. If get placed through off-campus drives held in other colleges, they will put your photo in their achievements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. A library is available but has only old books. They say that the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but it is not. Hostel rooms are okay to stay in. Food provided there is a major problem. Breakfast provided is the food cooked last night. Major machines are present in the college, but the fact is that they are not working.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are the worst. The college doesn't provide placements to many students. Only one company visits the college, but it is not a good company. The salaries offered are very low. The training provided is average.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is bad. The lab equipment and instruments don't work properly. The college provided only 3 buses for transport, in the cities. The college environment is poor. The strength of students is decreased in our college. Overall, it is an average college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018

content.Placements: No placement are provided on our campus. The hostel is waste regarding placements. They'll suggest only off-campus, only BPO and non-core companies were suggested. The job opportunity through this college is very low. Regarding the job wise, the college is very poor.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good for your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good enough for engineering college. Wi-Fi was not available. Labs, libraries and classrooms on the campus were good. The hostel was the worst. A room had to be shared by six students. The food served was good. Other facilities provided were also good.

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members. There are poor facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. There is a good library, but it is of no use as teachers do not give free time. There are goods labs. But there is no good canteen. I don't know about the hostel because I was a day scholar. Facility wise, it is not bad. But not good interiors in the hostel. They encourage some sports, and students' skills were good.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements. Faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not much good. A library is available but has only old books. They say that the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but it is not. Hostel rooms are okay to stay in. Food provided there is a major problem. Breakfast provided is the food cooked last night. Major machines are present in the college, but the fact is that they are not working.

reviews.review_heading: An average college, the worst placements, and average classes.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is bad. The lab equipment and instruments don't work properly. The college provided only 3 buses for transport, in the cities. The college environment is poor. The strength of students is decreased in our college. Overall, it is an average college.

reviews.review_heading: Not worth for knowledgeable students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is poor. The campus is small, and buildings are not maintained well. No renovative works have been done to them. There is lack of facilities. The books available in the libraries are a few. Labs are not well-maintained so far.

reviews.review_heading: Its suits for those who want just a degree.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good with enough windows and doors. College atmosphere were surrounded by full of trees which provides nice air circulation. And all others facilities are not up to the level for example library is not updated with new books, they will not give much importance and motivation in sports and cultural activities. Hostel and hostel food was the worst. In canteen they won't provide what we want, they provide what is available, that too we don't have choices. In labs half of the machine...

reviews.review_heading: This is the college where you have to study like you did in a school
reviews.review_text: Basically, the college is very clean and spacious. In classrooms, they're providing proper arrangements to the students. In the library, they have the proper equipment. But in some departments, they're using very old equipment also. They have a general library as well as separate department library which will be very helpful for the students. The playground is also maintained by them very well.

reviews.review_heading: An absolutely number one fraud college.
reviews.review_text: It has an old library, no good hostel facility, no sports day. The faculty members don't get their salaries for several months. Many persons have attempted suicides due to the bad atmosphere. No advanced technology is used. Buildings are still unfinished. If any joins this college, I am damn sure that they are knowingly falling into hell.

One of the best college to study in Trichy, in the heart of Tamil Nadu. Also it is very near from central Trichy. If you are living in any of the neighboring districts near Trichy, then this will be a good college for studies. As far as placements are concerned only minimal companies came when I was studying. Now I'm sure it would have improved. In terms of sports and activities, you can really participate in all state and district level competitions. One of the best college to study in Trichy, in the heart of Tamil Nadu. Also it is very near from central Trichy. If you are living in any of the neighboring districts near Trichy, then this will be a good college for studies. As far as placements are concerned only minimal companies came when I was studying. Now I'm sure it would have improved. In terms of sports and activities, you can really participate in all state and district level competitions.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, and I studied more from college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is somewhat good. Free Wi-Fi is available, and management is good. The hostel is good, and they provide a free bed for hostel students. Labs have more equipment like MNC machine in mechanical and civil branches. There are large and smart classrooms and large computer labs with air-conditioners speciality.

reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2024 and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college consistently provides placement training for us. This training is very useful and helps us in our placement drive. About 70% of the students get placed in many companies, including MNCs. The top roles are software engineering and full stack development, and the minimum salary package is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The first-year hostel is very nice, but the hostels for the second, third, and fourth years are good but old. The college infrastructure is very good, and the library is nice. Our college has a very nice infrastructure, and the classrooms have smart boards, which are very helpful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Simply a good college.

review_content.Placements: For our department, there are very few core companies that came for campus placement. So the chance to get job through on campus placement is very low. But many IT related companies came and definitely we get placed if we have computer knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my department, the classrooms are smart classes which having smartboards. But Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs are pretty good to do the practicals and library has lots of books in each section. Hostel is not so good but it is very secure. Food is average.

individual_reviews.title: Mahendra Institute of Technology Review.

content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms and free library make studying comfortable for students. No extra charges for the library, and labs are also good to see and work in. The quality of food is different from other colleges, and sports are also different. In the CSE department, everything is going well.

individual_reviews.title: This is the best way for your bright future.

Mahendra Institute of Technology has well-furnished hostels with facilities like purified drinking water, hot water, cold water, 24-hour power backup, common reading room, dining hall and requisite medical facilities.
Facilities for communication, entertainment, and indoor games such chess, carom and modern gym are also provided to each hostel separately.

library.description:
Mahendra Institute of Technology has a spacious library with well stacked Books, Journal and Magazines. There are more than 3847 titles with 10283 volumes of Books in engineering, technology, science and management. The Digital Library of institute has 771 CDs containing learning material on various subjects and 247 e-Journals and Magazines. The Library has online book search and issue facilities.
Audio Visual Section and Reprographic facility is also available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and best knowledgeable students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for the CSE department include classrooms, libraries, laboratories, a computer lab, and audio-visual rooms. The quality of the facility in a hostel can vary depending on the instruction, but it can include good food.

reviews.review_heading: Mahendra Institute of Technology Review.
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms and free library make studying comfortable for students. No extra charges for the library, and labs are also good to see and work in. The quality of food is different from other colleges, and sports are also different. In the CSE department, everything is going well.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024 and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The first-year hostel is very nice, but the hostels for the second, third, and fourth years are good but old. The college infrastructure is very good, and the library is nice. Our college has a very nice infrastructure, and the classrooms have smart boards, which are very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Simply a good college.
reviews.review_text: In my department, the classrooms are smart classes which having smartboards. But Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs are pretty good to do the practicals and library has lots of books in each section. Hostel is not so good but it is very secure. Food is average.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best way for your bright future.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities are excellent. In our campus, we have facilitated computer labs and Chemistry labs and a room of knowledge (library). In a week, 5 days are working days. Saturdays and Sundays are leave days and last but not the least, sports activities are well and good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a temple of learning.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well developed and it has good and sufficient hostel facilities for the students to stay and study. The college contains efficient labs filled with course-oriented equipment which help students to enhance their knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for good future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. All the necessities have been fulfilled by the institution. The college has good classrooms with smart boards which are helpful for the students to understand better about the subject. We have a good library to gain our knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahendra Institute of Technology - MIT.
reviews.review_text: In our department, information technology has facilities like huge labs, many projector rooms, a department library, etc. available. Our hostel is average, depending upon your selection, there are normal rooms and deluxe rooms available, and the food is worthy and the canteen is available. For medical emergencies, there is a 24X7 ambulance facility to the hospital. There is a very large sports ground, indoor stadiums, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am a little satisfied because of the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The classroom and library are good but there is no Wi-Fi, currently, it is unavailable in this college. The lab is also strictly allowed once a week for use. But the hostel is a little bad and the hostel food is also a little bad to eat daily.

reviews.review_heading: I am not much satisfied and it is not as expected.
reviews.review_text: We have classrooms with the board. There are very less smartboard facilities. Library is available. Labs are properly maintained. Hostel facilities are very low. There are very less restroom facilities. Food in the mess is not hygienic and not that good. Medical facilities are fine. Sports and games are not provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure was nice and placements are only for IT sector.
reviews.review_text: Food was worst but the infrastructure was a little nice. There is a sports ground but we played once on Utsav function. There is no first aid in our block and no medical support. There are 2 buildings, one was an annex building and the other was the main building.

reviews.review_heading: This course is the best. It provides fine infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an average infrastructure, and it is very old design. Gardens are not maintained well. It provides all laboratories in our college. Wi-Fi is not provided to the students. The library is average, and the hostel food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college for placements and learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very. It gives positive vibes to the students, and the hostel facility of the institute is very well. It provides clean rooms, and the food quality is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Placements in our college are very good, but some areas like symposium, etc., have to be improved.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life is good but not much enjoyable and not much strict here. So, you can use mobile phones in the hostel, and the mess is very comfortable for you. The mess fee is about Rs. 3,000 only. Non-vegetarian is served on the campus, and a restaurant is also available on this campus.

reviews.review_heading: I had a great experience here, and you will absolutely like this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides an awesome hostel, and I have stayed for 3 years in the hostel only. There was a high-speed internet facility in the hostel and also 24 hours of electricity facility. There is a library on the main campus, and the classrooms are neat and clean. They are also providing smart classrooms nowadays. Teachers will teach most of the syllabus through PowerPoint presentation. The food served in the hostel is better compared with outside food. Its quality is good, and even the quantit...

reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides very good placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed in our college. The lowest salary offered is Rs.22,000 per month and the highest salary is Rs.80,000 per month. Lactalis and respected state cooperatives companies like Amul visit our college to offer placements. The top role is offered in the R&D section.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are available with good flooring and painting. Campus is neat and clean. Hostel mess is good and serves different and healthy food items for students from other states. There are grounds for physical fitness and healthy life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The campus life is quite enjoyable.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students in this course get placements. All of the students get internships in the final year. They do their internship in Amul and Anand. They also get farm training too. The college offers great opportunities. We do our best as dairy technologists.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our labs are superb. We have all types of equipment for practicals. But we don't have Wi-Fi. Our hostel is superb and it is always clean. Our library is quite modern. We have all the books related to our course in the library. Food available in our mess is not bad. We have ground for games practice.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty members and campus.

review_content.Placements: Placements in college are not good because there are not many students. Companies do visit the college to hire students, but they come to know that there are many students and leave to other colleges. Other courses like B.Tech and MBA are better than the diploma course because companies visit for their placements. Core companies do not visit for the placements of diploma students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is the best in my opinion because this college is some kilometres away from the main markets, so there is no pollution. The campus is good for diploma and B.Tech courses. The college has a big library, and there are many books in the library to read. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of faculty members, placements and various facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements from the college. You have to place yourself by finding any job in any company. Here very less number of students are placed in a company that is happened in very first. At the time, when the college is established, some students got placed in companies, but nowadays there is lack of faculty members as well as students. So you cannot get the placements in any company. You have to place yourself in any specific field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel as well as in college. Hostel facilities are not good in condition. Lunch and dinner are not good because they don't use proper spices. Classwork is also bad because the faculty members don't have the experience in any particular subject. Here anyone can teach anything without knowledge. I'm very much shocked that in professional courses. I'm facing this situation which I had never thought of it. There are no sports as there is no ground for playing cricket or football. It is a very boring college, and I had ever seen it before.

review_summary.college_name: ABSS Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good and value for money.

content.Placements: The placement ratio in our college is average but not bad. Last time, approximately 25 students were placed by our college, including B.Tech, MBA, and B.Pharm students, etc. The last company that visited was BNK Pharmaceuticals, to offer pharmacy students job placements in their respective fields, like MR (Market Representative), QA (Quality Assurance), and QC (Quality Control), etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent and filled with greenery and a happy environment. In college, all facilities are available, like Wi-Fi for the library, all the equipment available for labs, properly ventilated classrooms, and separate departments. Our hostel is named Chandra Shekhar Azad Boys Hostel. In the hostel, all facilities are available for students, like Wi-Fi, a big dining area, a volleyball ground, a football ground, and a basketball ground. The food is prepared for students with fully hygienic and clean procedures by fully trained and experienced cooks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed with the syllabus and study structure.

content.Placements: Maximum 80% of the students are placed in our batch. The maximum salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. Pyramid and Chegg India are the top recruiting companies of our college. Students are offered with subject matter expert and technical support roles. Most of the students did their training but not in a company as there is no company near our college. But all the students try hard to train themself.
content.Infrastructure: There are 3 labs in our department, and each lab has very good equipment. All the lab faculty members are well-educated and know how to teach students. Wi-Fi facility is also available. In the hostel, food quality is good, but the vegetables are not well-cooked. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel. Canteen is also available for 24x7, and all the sports facility is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members and campus.

content.Placements: Placements in college are not good because there are not many students. Companies do visit the college to hire students, but they come to know that there are many students and leave to other colleges. Other courses like B.Tech and MBA are better than the diploma course because companies visit for their placements. Core companies do not visit for the placements of diploma students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is the best in my opinion because this college is some kilometres away from the main markets, so there is no pollution. The campus is good for diploma and B.Tech courses. The college has a big library, and there are many books in the library to read. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of faculty members, placements and various facilities.

content.Placements: There are no placements from the college. You have to place yourself by finding any job in any company. Here very less number of students are placed in a company that is happened in very first. At the time, when the college is established, some students got placed in companies, but nowadays there is lack of faculty members as well as students. So you cannot get the placements in any company. You have to place yourself in any specific field.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel as well as in college. Hostel facilities are not good in condition. Lunch and dinner are not good because they don't use proper spices. Classwork is also bad because the faculty members don't have the experience in any particular subject. Here anyone can teach anything without knowledge. I'm very much shocked that in professional courses. I'm facing this situation which I had never thought of it. There are no sports as there is no ground for playing cricket or football. It is a very boring college, and I had ever seen it before.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Join ABSS institute of technology.

content.Placements: The placement offered in the college are average. As per the college, it makes an effort but not getting esteemed results. The chairman sir is indulging properly in the academic activities, educational tours, and many seminars are held to give a good personality to a student.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. It has a big building with lots of parking space and ground for playing. The basketball court, volleyball court, hostel, seminar hall and big classrooms are available. Rather it has space for the canteen, but it's not maintained well.

admission_process.title: ABSS Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: ABSS Institute of Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, ABSS Institute of Technology considers scores in JEE Main, CAT, and MAT for admission to specific courses.ABSS Institute of Technologyoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,44,800 - 2,82,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,33,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 1376656 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 507725 in 2023.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Best college to enjoy the student life .

review_content.Placements: 45-50% students get placed. The highest package is 3.5 lpa, and the lowest package is 2 lpa. Top recruiters are Infosys and TCS. Internship needs to be completed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. Separate building for each branch, labs, classrooms, and Wi-Fi connection are available. Common library is available. In our hostel, quality of food, medical facilities, sports and games are average.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. Better teaching quality. Course curriculum is relevant, but the students are not completely ready for the industry. 75% is the pass percentage. Some subjects are easy to pass, but 2-3 subjects are difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College staffs are good, and their teaching is quite good.

review_content.Placements: Placement is only for Computer Science students. I am a 2021-25 batch student. I cleared my BE in Mechanical Engineering with 0 backlog. They offer mechanical engineering, civil engineering, electronics and communication engineering, and computer science engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab, classroom, and sports facilities are available. Hostel facility and Wi-Fi facility are also there in our government engineering college Chamarajanagar, and the library is also there in our college. The canteen is recently built but not open yet. There is a bakery in the college surroundings.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college to enjoy the student life .

content.Placements: 45-50% students get placed. The highest package is 3.5 lpa, and the lowest package is 2 lpa. Top recruiters are Infosys and TCS. Internship needs to be completed.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. Separate building for each branch, labs, classrooms, and Wi-Fi connection are available. Common library is available. In our hostel, quality of food, medical facilities, sports and games are average.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. Better teaching quality. Course curriculum is relevant, but the students are not completely ready for the industry. 75% is the pass percentage. Some subjects are easy to pass, but 2-3 subjects are difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College staffs are good, and their teaching is quite good.

content.Placements: Placement is only for Computer Science students. I am a 2021-25 batch student. I cleared my BE in Mechanical Engineering with 0 backlog. They offer mechanical engineering, civil engineering, electronics and communication engineering, and computer science engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Lab, classroom, and sports facilities are available. Hostel facility and Wi-Fi facility are also there in our government engineering college Chamarajanagar, and the library is also there in our college. The canteen is recently built but not open yet. There is a bakery in the college surroundings.

highlights.summary: The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Thamirabharani Engineering College admission to BE/BTech courses.

faqs.answer:
A:    Thamirabharani Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.
faqs.question: How can I get into Thamirabharani Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Thamirabharani Engineering College offers Degree courses including 5 UG course. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Thamirabharani Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: Thamirabharani Engineering College review.

review_content.Placements: The college provides the best package salary for this course. There are four batches of students in this course, and 30 to 40% of students are placed in companies each year. Companies like TNS, TATA Group, and Khar Technologies provide internships to college students.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college provides a high-quality infrastructure with excellent facilities. These facilities include fast Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, bathrooms, a library, and a canteen. The college also has sports teams that participate in tournaments every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Overall review of Tamirabarani Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: In this college, a 60% to 70% placement guarantee is provided, and in the previous year, 60 percent of students got placement in different companies like Wipro, Accenture, Tata, HCL, and Infosys. The highest package is 15 LPA, and the lowest package is approximately 4 LPA, with an average of 5 LPA. There is no chance to get an internship. B.Tech CSE is a modern, future-visibility course in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, the infrastructure is well-defined and well-structured because all the buildings look beautiful. All classrooms have projectors, and the lab classrooms have AC. Hostel food quality was not good in our time, but it's acceptable. Medical facilities are very good, and a large playground for sports is available so everyone can play games. I like it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college and satisfied with it.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of people got placed in top companies from our college during the last academic year. The highest package is 21 lacs, the average package is 4.5 lacs and the lowest package is 3 lacs. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Mahindra, TCS, Tata motors and so on. I know 40% of my classmates have got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is well cleaned, has nice infrastructure and is a very maintained college. My college has libraries, which are common for both lecturers and students. The classrooms of our college are very clean. Many of my friends stay in the college hostel, which is very nice and the food in the mess is too good. And we also have a sports room for every member.

reviews.review_heading: Best training and placement cell.
reviews.review_text: Spread across a 25 acre campus, TEC offers lush greenery, spacious AC classrooms, well equipped labs, computer, electronics, Physics, Chemistry, seminar halls and a digital library. There were separate boys and girls. Hostels with ventilated rooms, study furniture and recreational space, plus on campus mess facilities, sports grounds, and transport connectivity across the Tirunelveli district. A medical center with a doctor and nurse plus basic first aid provisions was also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi was not available. Labs were well-equipped with instruments and machinery. The library was well furnished. The hostel of our college was good. Facilities like fresh drinking water, clean washrooms, geysers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Thamirabharani Engineering College review.
reviews.review_text: This college provides a high-quality infrastructure with excellent facilities. These facilities include fast Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, bathrooms, a library, and a canteen. The college also has sports teams that participate in tournaments every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall review of Tamirabarani Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is well-defined and well-structured because all the buildings look beautiful. All classrooms have projectors, and the lab classrooms have AC. Hostel food quality was not good in our time, but it's acceptable. Medical facilities are very good, and a large playground for sports is available so everyone can play games. I like it.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well cleaned, has nice infrastructure and is a very maintained college. My college has libraries, which are common for both lecturers and students. The classrooms of our college are very clean. Many of my friends stay in the college hostel, which is very nice and the food in the mess is too good. And we also have a sports room for every member.

reviews.review_heading: Good for your future and life.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the facilities the engineering college should have. It has proper classrooms with fully air-conditioned classes and well-maintained labs for projects and practicals. The hostel is also good but the food in the mess is not good as home food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Thamirabharani Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent in our college. There are many facilities provided by our college management. They provide Wi-Fi connectivity for labs and digital classrooms, and a library with a huge collection of books. They provide hostel facility and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is awesome and the facilities are good. The classrooms are good, the labs are well-equipped, and the library is good. There are many books available in the library and a Wi-Fi facility is also available. The hostel is nice the food tasty good. Canteens are also available. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with all the facilities of our college.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about this college is its infrastructure. The campus is very beautiful and nature-friendly. The Wi-Fi facility is also available on the whole campus, and the hostel facility is also good. All necessary facilities, like medical facilities, canteens, and sports facilities, are available on campus. Mess foods are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It is good college and good faculty .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good labs are good enough classrooms are big and they are sufficient for students there are sports in our college both inter branch and sports fest. 24 hours Wi-Fi is enable the hostel provided a good food. We have a beautiful mess it can accomodate around 400 student .

reviews.review_heading: Thamirabharani Engineering college .
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are just awesome because it provides an tasty, healthy and hygienic food to students and it also has fixed time at which students can play various games and sports. The facilities available for this course include library, clean and AC classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and experienced faculties
reviews.review_text: Very neet and clean infrastructure,Hostel and food is very good.Transport availability in all areas.wifi connectivity available in all departments.the lab equipments are very compact and working properly.the classrooms are very clean.Batminton court and cricket grounds available.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with a good management who encourages and enforce the to students to explore.
reviews.review_text: All the classes in our college are designed for the single seater arrangement classrooms, so all the classrooms are very spacious with good natural lighting. All the labs are fully equipped to the most appropriate and rare labs like mechatronics labs are available in our college. Environmental lab, hydraulic lab, strength of materials lab, soil mechanics lab for civil engineering students and all the other departments of engineering have their most appropriate and excellent machines, all the equ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Thamirabharani Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, but not bad. All the lab equipment was available here, and we had a small library. We had so many canteens available here. We had a medical clinic for hostelers and also day boarders. The hostel facility was very good. Nice rooms and a mess provided very high-quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Review to fulfill students' decisions.
reviews.review_text: This college provides a high-quality infrastructure with excellent facilities. All facilities, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library, are available with all necessary equipment. The college also has a sports team that participates in the tournament every year and change the college image.

review_content.Placements: 60-70% of the students got placed in different companies from the course. The lowest package is Rs. 1,80,000 and the highest package is 3,60,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided for our course are good. the college has labs, classroom, libraries and all are good. Quality of hostel is average.

reviews_list.review_title: Do not take admission in HIT.

review_content.Placements: Do not take admission here. I was a student of B.Tech, and there were no placements provided by the college. Do not take admission in HIT. Otherwise you will waste precious years of your life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Revana Siddeshwara Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: I am studying in this college, but I have failed in the 1st year due to backlogs. Even there is the worst management. Don't get admission here through management quota. I got admission through management quota. The teaching facility is average.
review_content.Infrastructure: Amenities like a library, canteen, are available here. There is a hostel facility, and I would rate only 3 stars. The college structure is good, but the food served in the canteen is not tasty. Wi-Fi password is also provided. They do not allow to operate mobile phones. The main security is fully strict. They are no bunking options. The library room is good. ATM is also available. The college offers a good environment. The campus is in a forest area. This is the only college in this area. The campus is good. The sports ground is available. We play cricket and basketball here. I would rate only 2 stars for the food quality. The college is 2 km from the main road. College bus is available. In case if the college bus is missed, then you have to go by walk.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college campus, facilities, surroundings and placements except faculty.

review_content.Placements: To be frank, the placements in this college are worst compared to the other colleges. The teaching is very good, but the campus is not maintained, and the strength of students is very less, but I don't know how this college is in top 10 lists at Google. There are no internships and pre-projects in the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very bad, still, they haven't completed the construction of the main building. The toilets are maintained bad, and boys hostels are the worst. There is no Wi-Fi at labs, and all the equipment are the old ones. The classrooms are faded, I mean they have not maintained well. There are no medical facilities in the college. Sports are not bad, and it has been conducted only once in a year no practice, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Revana Siddeshwara Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Quite satisfied with the infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: Overall, 10% of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered is 4 LPA, the lowest package is 2.8 LPA, and the average package is 3.4 LPA. The top recruiting company for our course is Wipro. Almost all the students got internships, and they all have joined start-up companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and classrooms are good. The benches and desks are good. The department rooms are good. Labs are good, and the library is good. The hostel Wi-Fi is good, but the only thing which is not good is the food in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Thermal Power Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Our college has unskilled faculty members, poor placements and improper transportation facilities.

content.Placements: M.Tech in thermal power engineering course was offered by our college with an intake of 18 students during 2012 when I joined. Out of 18 students, 13 students were from all over the Bangalore region. Placements are not at all available in our college for M.Tech course, and even for B.E, they are very less. The scope for this course is high in the market, so we are able to find jobs outside the college. We got internships, skilled courses and placement training from other institutes for our career development.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was started in 1997. From its establishment until now, the infrastructure is the same without any development in canteen and hostel facility, even though the college is very far from the main road and town. Classrooms are very old. Labs have good machinery but don't have proper maintenance. The library has a very old style infrastructure with very less copies and old editions of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Revana Siddeshwara Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: I am studying in this college, but I have failed in the 1st year due to backlogs. Even there is the worst management. Don't get admission here through management quota. I got admission through management quota. The teaching facility is average.
content.Infrastructure: Amenities like a library, canteen, are available here. There is a hostel facility, and I would rate only 3 stars. The college structure is good, but the food served in the canteen is not tasty. Wi-Fi password is also provided. They do not allow to operate mobile phones. The main security is fully strict. They are no bunking options. The library room is good. ATM is also available. The college offers a good environment. The campus is in a forest area. This is the only college in this area. The campus is good. The sports ground is available. We play cricket and basketball here. I would rate only 2 stars for the food quality. The college is 2 km from the main road. College bus is available. In case if the college bus is missed, then you have to go by walk.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college campus, facilities, surroundings and placements except faculty.

content.Placements: To be frank, the placements in this college are worst compared to the other colleges. The teaching is very good, but the campus is not maintained, and the strength of students is very less, but I don't know how this college is in top 10 lists at Google. There are no internships and pre-projects in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very bad, still, they haven't completed the construction of the main building. The toilets are maintained bad, and boys hostels are the worst. There is no Wi-Fi at labs, and all the equipment are the old ones. The classrooms are faded, I mean they have not maintained well. There are no medical facilities in the college. Sports are not bad, and it has been conducted only once in a year no practice, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Revana Siddeshwara Institute of Technology review

content.Placements: One of the major drawbacks of the college. The only reputed company coming to the college for placement was IBM, which ended up selecting just 2 people for a technical job. All other companies turn up only for BPO jobs and nothing technical. Yet, the total placement would be 15 out of 200 people.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are one of the best features of the college. A lot of practical knowledge is imparted here. It is one of the interesting courses in computer science. The library has very limited books. They have a good auditorium for indoor programs and also a good and a secured parking lot for students and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Sri Revana Siddeshwara Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-constructed in a large place, but commuting is a problem since there are no means of transport for reaching there. There are good lab facilities and parking space. There is an outdoor ground, but no indoor stadium. The canteen in the campus is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Review about Sri Revanna Siddeshwara Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text:
It was just okay. There is no modern infrastructure, however, I heard that they have developed it.
The labs were good and did have the required equipment for studies. They had computer science, electronic, microprocessor, chemistry and mechanical labs. The faculty members provided good training in labs.

reviews.review_heading: Worst college in the whole world.
reviews.review_text: Even Yalahnka Railway Station’s infrastructure is better than this college. They do not have proper labs. They have just 10-12 computer systems in total which work properly. Other than that all the systems are useless. Even there is not a proper road for college. They don't provide buses for all the students. Students have to walk 2 kms to reach the bus stand.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are pretty mediocre, and there are no smart class facilities. There are only two rooms in the college which have a projector. The college is in the middle, so there is no proper road to the college. People also doubt the structural integrity of the institution.

admission_overview.college_name: Institute of Aeronautics and Engineering Bhopal Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application Process & Dates

paragraphs: IAE Bhopaladmissions 2025 are ongoing.Candidates can fill out application forms through the official website of the institute.

IAE Bhopal admissionis entrance-based. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria for the courses can apply online through the IAE Bhopal official website.IAE Bhopaloffers admission to most UG and Certification courses, including BTech, BSc, BBA, etc, based on the entrance exam SSAT that is conducted by the institute. Candidates who clear the admission process are eligible to pay the course fee and secure their seats.

The courses are offered in an offline method. Candidates can choose from a variety of courses such as BTech, BSc, and BBA. The institute offers courses in the UG and Certificate course levels. Learn more aboutIAE Bhopal coursesthrough the highlights table given below:
Particulars
IAE Bhopal Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Regular/ Full-Time

10+ courses across multiple specialisations
How to apply?
https://iaebhopal.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Undergraduate, Certificate
Popular programmes
BTech| BSc| BBA
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

IAE  Bhopal offers more than 10 undergraduate, and certification courses to students across various streams. IAE Bhopal course admission 2025 to all courses is subject to an entrance test. Check out all the popularIAE Bhopal Bhopal coursesalong with their selection criteria and eligibility in the table below:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with PCM as main subects
Class 12 with Science stream

After the selection has been finalised, candidates have to pay theIAE Bhopal feefor their seat confirmation. IAE Bhopal varies with different course levels. The total fee is the combination of various components such as hostel fees, tuition fees, security deposits, and more. The institute can change the fee structure of the course. The university may reserve seats for reserved category candidates. Check below IAE Bhopal fee  along with the seat intake in the following table:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee and seat intake are taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

The admission process for courses at IAE Bhopal is entrance-based, and candidates are required to appear for the SSAT to participate in the admission process of courses offered by IAE Bhopal. Check out the admission process below to learn more:
STEP 1: IAE Bhopal Application Process 2025

The application process for all courses at IAE Bhopal is ongoing. Candidates can fill out theIAE Bhopal application form 2025on the official website of the institute. Candidates are required to provide legitimate details and documents in the application form.
STEP 2: IAE Bhopal Selection Rounds 2025

Candidates who have submitted the application form must appear for the selection rounds, which include appearing for the SSAT. Candidates who are shortlisted on the basis of the entrance exam scores are also required to provide medical fitness proof.
STEP 3: IAE Bhopal Shortlist Release and Final Offer
The results of the selection process will be available on the official website and sent to the contact information of the candidate as well.
STEP 4: IAE Bhopal Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates who have made it to the final shortlist must pay the course fee and finalise their admission. Candidates can start attending the classes on campus by checking the session start date. The document verification process is done to ensure the authenticity of the candidate. Candidates are required to get the original and scanned documents with themselves.

faqs.question: What it the admission process for BTech at IAE Bhopal?
faqs.answer: IAE Bhopal has a multi-step admission process for BTech. Candidates initially apply through the online application form at the official website and for the entrance exam SSAT.
