faqs.question: Is admission to various courses offered by IAE Bhopal entrance based or merit based?
faqs.answer: Admission to courses offered by IAE Bhopal are entrance based. Candidates wishing to get a seat at IAE Bhopal must appear for SSAT 2025. Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the test. Shortlisted candidates are required to provide the medical fitness documents to guarantee their selection. Once the document verification is completed, candidates can then pay the course fee.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for A.M.E. at Institute of Aeronautics and Engineering, Sha-Shib Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for the Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME) at Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha-Shib Group of Institutions, is 60 for each specialization, namely Avionics and Mechanical (B1.1). The Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA) has approved this course, and the institute offers AME programs in these two specializations, with a seat intake of 60 for each. The admission procedure is based on merit.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Institute of Aeronautics and Engineering, Sha-Shib Group of Institutions entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Sha-Shib Group follows gudelines from state and central government regulatory bodies like AICTE, DGCA, NCTE, DTE, UGC, and affilated universities for admission to undergraduates, postgraduates, license, and certifiactes course at approved institutes.Admissions are based on merit and can be found on individual institutes websites.Hope it will help!Thanks

faqs.question: Is SSAT exam compulsory for admission to BBA course at IAE Bhopal?
faqs.answer: SSAT exam is conducted by Sha-Shib Group in order to shortlist aspirants for admission inAviationcourses offered like Commercial Pilot License, Aircraft Maintenance Engineering, Cabin Crew/ Air Hostess, Ground Staff, etc. Candidates willing to secure admission in the AME can attend the entrance exam. However,  merely appearing for SSAT 2025 or getting a high score in the exam does not guarantee admission to the AME course. Candidates must make sure to have a valid eligibility criteria as per the BTeh admission guidelines, in order to secure admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: Institute of Aeronautics and Engineering Bhopal Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive education with modern facilities and holistic development.
reviews.review_text:
Course infrastructure:
In the classroom, smart boards, projectors, and audio-visual aids for interactive learning. Workshop hands-on training space for engineering, mechanical, or other technical course. High-speed Wi-Fi & internet facility. Hostel infrastructure:
Low-furnished room with beds, study table, chair, and cupboard. Clean and hygienic bathroom with normal water. Nutritious meals served in a hygienic mess and drinking water facilities with RO purifier. 
24/7 security and CCTV facilitie...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the narrow minded people.
reviews.review_text:
The structure and infrastructure of college are not that great.
There is no Wi-Fi in the college, hostel, or even library.
There are only a few useful books available in the library.
There are labs and practical classes held, which are really great and helpful as they give you firsthand knowledge of how tools and equipment work.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you join this college if you want a different roadway to success.
reviews.review_text: This college is 32 years old, so you can see an old traditional mark. Facilities are getting updated day by day as per the requirements of students and time. It provides a 3-times food as per students menu. The hostel provides 3 students in a non-air-conditioned room.

reviews.review_heading: AME is a professional and unique course. High-paid jobs are available in this field.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fantastic, and Wi-Fi is available. Internet blocker is also installed in our college. The library and hostel facility are very best. Canteen facilities are also fine. Medical facilities are fine, and various types of sports are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a professional course. The course gives high salary jobs, but it will need a lot of hard work.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, but it is a bit old. Wi-Fi is not available for students, and a net blocker is also installed in the college. Classrooms are fine, and the library is also fine. The hostel is very bad, and the rooms are very small. The mess is bad, and the cleanliness of the mess is also not good. The canteen is closed most of the time. Medical facilities are fine. Volleyball, football, cricket, etc., are played.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Aeronautics and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: It has an excellent infrastructure with great ambience for students who are dedicated to studies. The canteen is best. The mess timings are scheduled right with a great taste of food. The college conducts sports day in our college with all extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college. It is because of excellent placements and live practicals.
reviews.review_text: I would rate 7 out of 10 for the infrastructure of the college. It needs to improve in a few areas like playfields and mess. The classrooms and hostels are satisfactory. The infrastructure of the college is good. The college has its own three aircraft, mraos company, isbl, jet engine & piston engine, radio, and tools shops, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are normal as compared to the other.
reviews.review_text: Regarding the infrastructure, there is no need to say about it because HR department of college is working day by day to provide better facilities for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best campus for aircraft maintenance engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this institute is better than any AMEN institutes. You get a library, sports campus and Wi-Fi facilities. The medical facility is not available in the college campus. It is far away from the college. You will get hostel facility. The canteen is available, but it is not too good. You will get only little choices there.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, course is also good, but take admission after getting all points and requirements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good. The library with new books and updated technology is available. For games, there is no playground. The food quality is average. Food quality in the canteen is better than the mess food. The college building is good. The market is near the college.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college, knows how to gain more and more money, and no teaching is provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is approximately 9 to 10 acres. The Wi-Fi facility is not for the students. Only, the library is good as required and canteen is luxurious, and there are no sitting arrangements to eat, and you have to eat the food by standing that too in dust place because they don't even clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college faculty is not good as required. The college main attention is on money not on teaching.
reviews.review_text: The college is containing 30-acres. The infrastructure of the college good and well-maintained library with all types of the required books. The classrooms are small with a seating capacity of almost 30 students. The hostel rooms are in average size but not properly maintained. The canteen is bad, the quality of the food is getting lower day by day.

Very good college for aeronautics. We have lot of fun activities and learning here. It is the best college. It has well organised labs and practice schedule. In matter of learning it has best professors who are very cooperative and helpful. Salary package is also nice. Very good college for aeronautics. We have lot of fun activities and learning here. It is the best college. It has well organised labs and practice schedule. In matter of learning it has best professors who are very cooperative and helpful. Salary package is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: The college with 100 percent placement guarantee .
reviews.review_text: Faculty are all very good and are very experienced, study is the first priority of this college all teachers are very knowledgeable friendly and helps us at everything related to study. Sports are also held we have volleyball court football ground cricket ground badminton court separate for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this is a good college though.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the necessary infrastructure and very satisfying facilities also. We have 8 different labs like JET Engine lab, Piston Engine lab, Instrument Lab, Airframe shop etc. Other than aviation facilities, we have a modern Computer lab, Play Ground, and Indoor games facilities. Mess was good.

review_content.General: Our college has good infrastructure with playgrounds and a lot of activities, a canteen is available at affordable price, but for medical we have to go out of the college campus. A hospital is present beside the college, Gian Sagar Medical College. Overall, SVIET Punjab offers good infrastructure and supportive facilities for students. While some areas like mess food, can improve. The campus environment, labs, library, and academic support make it a suitable place for learning and growth. Each department has its own dedicated laboratories, and the CSE/IT labs are equipped with updated systems, necessary software, and proper technical support. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and many are fitted with SMART boards to make teaching more interactive. The library is one of the strong points of the campus, offering a wide collection of textbooks, reference material, journals, and a peaceful space for self-study.

review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are commendable, and they offer good Wi-Fi access; however, it is not available for first-year students. The college is very strict concerning the years, and they maintain rigorous educational standards. Additionally, they have an excellent mess and better IoT labs.

review_summary.college_name: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience of the college is really good, with teachers and facilities.

content.Placements: My course is BCA. Placements in our college are very nice in every course. There is 94% placements rate in our college, which is a really good rate. As I am from BCA, the main role I will get in future is in the technical field, like Software development, app development, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is also good for the whole college, with big, great buildings, and Wi-Fi in labs with AC. Also, the college canteen and mess are really good with great food taste, depending on the person's taste. It also has a separate sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is good in terms of fees.

content.Placements: 3 batches are running the unique, super60, and non super60 from unique. Your placement is fixed, depending on your skills, but the average package is 5 to 6 LPA. It is under contract with the company. If you do not have skills, you will be fired after 1 year.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure with playgrounds and a lot of activities, a canteen is available at affordable price, but for medical we have to go out of the college campus. A hospital is present beside the college, Gian Sagar Medical College. Overall, SVIET Punjab offers good infrastructure and supportive facilities for students. While some areas like mess food, can improve. The campus environment, labs, library, and academic support make it a suitable place for learning and growth. Each department has its own dedicated laboratories, and the CSE/IT labs are equipped with updated systems, necessary software, and proper technical support. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and many are fitted with SMART boards to make teaching more interactive. The library is one of the strong points of the campus, offering a wide collection of textbooks, reference material, journals, and a peaceful space for self-study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Budget friendly college.

content.Placements: Nearly 90% of the students secured good placements. The average package goes to 6 LPA, and the highest package goes to 50 LPA. Companies like Jio and Paytm are involved, and the college has several startups on campus as well, providing better industrial training.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are commendable, and they offer good Wi-Fi access; however, it is not available for first-year students. The college is very strict concerning the years, and they maintain rigorous educational standards. Additionally, they have an excellent mess and better IoT labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best review for SVIET College.

content.Placements: Overall, 80% of students are placed in our course with a lot of effort from our placement cell. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Wipro, Caelius Consulting, Antier Solutions, Sensation Solutions, and Infosys. Most roles in our course like web development, MERN stack development, and software development.
content.Infrastructure: The library and labs are fully unbelievable, and the college provides the best facilities to students to get more focus on their studies due to the good environment. The quality of facilities in our hostel is quite good, the food in the mess is of medium level, and the college also provides a canteen, along with sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and support of a faculty with strong placements.

content.Placements: Overall, the placement percentage is approximately 90%. They have secured placements in top companies. The highest package offered is up to 50 LPA. The average package offered by companies is 6.5 LPA. SVIET hatch attracted numerous estimated recruiters like Infosys, Wipro, IBM, Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc. Roles offered by companies are software developer, system engineer, data analyst, business analyst, network engineer, quality assurance engineer, consultant, etc. Approximately 70% of students have secured internships in companies like Infosys, Mamsys, Click lab, SQE Labs, etc.

placement_report.college_name: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. The institute recorded 96% placements for Engineering, 97% Pharmacy, 90% Business Management, 92% Computer Application and 91% Hotel Management placements for the batch 2024. The highest package offered during the Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes placements 2024 stood at INR 60 LPA , which was offered to the students of the BTech batch 2024. Further, the highest package offered to the MBA, MCA and HM batch 2024 stood at INR 24 LPA . The highest package offered to the Pharmacy batch 2024 stood at INR 28 LPA, whereas the highest package offered to the BCA batch 2024 stood at INR 6.2 LPA. The top recruiters of Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes in 2024 included Amazon, TCS, Decathlon, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Deloitte, Wipro, Dabur, HDFC Bank, Accenture, Jio, Cognizant, etc.
SVGI Placement Highlights 2024

faqs.question: Is Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes good for placements?
faqs.answer: Yes , Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, MBA, MCA, BPharma, etc. As per the latest report, the institute recorded 96% placements for Engineering, 97% Pharmacy, 90% Business Management, 92% Computer Application and 91% Hotel Management placements for the batch 2024. The the highest package offered during Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes placements 2024 stood at INR 60 LPA , which was offered to the students of the BTech batch 2024. Further, the the highest package offered to the MBA, MCA and HM batch 2024 stood at INR 25 LPA. The highest package offered to the Pharmacy batch 2024 stood at INR 28 LPA, whereas the highest package offered to the BCA batch 2024 stood at INR 6.2 LPA. The top recruiters of Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes in 2024 includes Amazon, TCS, Decathlon, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Deloitte, Wipro, Dabur, HDFC Bank, Accenture, Jio, Cognizant, etc..

faqs.answer: No, Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes is not hard to get for dedicated students. All a student has to do is fulfill the eligibility criteria. Candidates willing to get admission must take part in the Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes admission process before the last date of application. Candidates must know their Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. Follow the Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes application process mentioned below: Step 1: Visit the official website of Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes. Step 2: Select the required course and the college and fill out the registration form. Step 3: Submit the registration form with complete details.

The library functions on an open access system for the faculty, staff and students.

reviews.review_heading: The overall experience of the college is really good, with teachers and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is also good for the whole college, with big, great buildings, and Wi-Fi in labs with AC. Also, the college canteen and mess are really good with great food taste, depending on the person's taste. It also has a separate sports ground.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good in terms of fees.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure with playgrounds and a lot of activities, a canteen is available at affordable price, but for medical we have to go out of the college campus. A hospital is present beside the college, Gian Sagar Medical College. Overall, SVIET Punjab offers good infrastructure and supportive facilities for students. While some areas like mess food, can improve. The campus environment, labs, library, and academic support make it a suitable place for learning and growth. Each d...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 3 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Budget friendly college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are commendable, and they offer good Wi-Fi access; however, it is not available for first-year students. The college is very strict concerning the years, and they maintain rigorous educational standards. Additionally, they have an excellent mess and better IoT labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best review for SVIET College.
reviews.review_text: The library and labs are fully unbelievable, and the college provides the best facilities to students to get more focus on their studies due to the good environment. The quality of facilities in our hostel is quite good, the food in the mess is of medium level, and the college also provides a canteen, along with sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and support of a faculty with strong placements.
reviews.review_text: Swami Vivekananda Institute of Engineering and Technology in Pitta offers a comprehensive range of facilities and infrastructure to support its students' academics. The food quality in the mess and canteen is that they serve three hygienically prepared meals daily along with an evening snack. The food is prepared ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 7 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A college with best advancement in technologies.
reviews.review_text: Facilties we got each student their workstation. Every classroom has internet availability, each class has its smart board. Students has their study room, for washing clothes there is availability of washing machines. The food quality of mess is very good, they only focused on providing nutrient-based food.

reviews.review_heading: Study hard to get qualified in semester exam in college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classroom are all good, but the hostel is very bad. Management increases the hostel price 5k by every year. Mess food is hygienic and unhealthy. I always go to the canteen and eat some other stuff rather than eating mess food. The ground is available for cricket and football.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 2 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, good placement in 2023, really good infrastructure and facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities and good infrastructure like AC labs, digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, a digital library, and a library. The quality of mess food is very good, and the hostels also maintain hygiene, girls' safety, and medical, with lots of sports facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 2 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and good placement in 2023, really good infrastructure and facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities available in my course, like Wi-Fi in the classroom, labs, library, workshops, projectors in every classroom, and digital boards. The quality of the hostel is very nice, and the quality of mess food is also very nice. There is a canteen and a medical shop, and also a hospital. There are many games and sports events going on in our college, like football, basketball, badminton, chess, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management has an impressive review rating of 2.25 by 4 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management?

faqs.answer: A:    MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management are Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management?

faqs.answer: A:    MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech in streams such as Engineering, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management offer?

review_content.Placements: Almost 5-10 students got placed in this course. The minimum salary package offered ranges between 1 LPA - 2 LPA. Few private companies visit our college for recruitment. Placements are average. Internships are not offered at this college. Top roles are offered in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. All facilities are great. There is a decent library in this college. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are average. Medical facilities are available. The food served in the canteen is decent. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is not a great college but one can study and go ahead in their careers prospect.

review_content.Placements: Due to covid-19, our batch was severely affected. Our ECE branch was very disappointed as none of the companies visited our campus for placements. We applied for internships at Indian Railways and we got our internships at South Eastern Railway, Tatanagar.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are also average in this college. Wi-Fi was not enabled on campus but other facilities like classrooms, laboratories, computer laboratories, and the library were good for educational work. Our college hostel was not available so students had to arrange rooms for themselves. Canteen facilities were also average and the food quality was fine. First aid medical was provided in our college. Sports like football and cricket were available in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with its placements, but our campus is good.

review_content.Placements: Less than 30% of students got placed on-campus in the ECE department. The highest salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA to 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies were HCL, Tech Mahindra, and TCS. Many students got summer internships. The top roles offered were IT support and network engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility was not available. Laboratory instruments were not good. Classrooms were good, and the library was good. Hostel and mess were not available. It also provides a small canteen for tea, biscuits, and lunch.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college and I would not suggest anyone to take admission.

content.Placements: Some small companies came to our college such as Bihar Insecticides, RSB, RKFL, Mahindra Rise, MITS, Tech Atlantis, etc., which offered the package of 1.2 lacs per annum to 1.8 lacs per annum as the maximum. The placement cell of this college is not good. The faculty members of this college are not good because the college gives very low salaries, that's why good lecturers do not want to join this college for teaching. The college doesn't provide internship to the students. The students should search for an internship on their own.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi of this college is good in the library and computer lab only, but not everywhere in the college as it is given in their brochure. It is falsely written in their advertisement. The quality of classrooms and labs is average, and not much good. This college doesn't have its hostel for boys and girls. You have to search for a room by yourself near the college.

hostel_campus.college_name: MDITM - Maryland Institute of Technology & Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: MITM provides high-quality hostel infrastructure and facilities (including all rooms with attached bathroom) at the subsidized rate which provides the homely environment to make students feel comfortable. The food quality is of the highest standards with the MITM management performing regular quality checks to provide nutritious food to keep the students fit and agile to study better. A serene atmosphere with utmost care and security is provided for students in the campus along with excellent mess facility, water purifier, playground and 24 hours electricity supply, which provides home environment along with delicious food comparable to homemade food. The kitchen and water are carefully supervised for cleanliness and hygiene.

library.description: The central library of MITM is equipped with over 10000 volumes of technical books and 45 journals (National & International). MITM library plays a vital role in acquiring, organizing and disseminating knowledge. It has put in place policies and procedures, systems and services and ambiance that facilitate knowledge required for understanding and strengthening of subjects in Engineering. The fully computerized library with internet facility enables the staff and students to search and reserve books in advance. Digital library with an excellent infrastructure has been setup at the Library and Information Center building of MITM. This provides access to net based libraries and e-books, access to various National and International journals of different disciplines through e-Subscription.

faqs.answer: Bharathidasan Engineering College offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 4 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Bharathidasan Engineering College has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Bharathidasan Engineering College?

faqs.answer: Bharathidasan Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

reviews_list.review_title: The university is very good for students. It provides good facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are 60 students in one batch with at least 60% in 12th science. The salary offered to nursing staff is around Rs. 10,000-12,000 per month. The highest salary offered is Rs. 90,000 per month. The average salary offered to nursing staff is about Rs. 30,000-40,000 per month. AIIMS colleges are top recruiting companies for nursing professions. About 20-30% of students got internships at AIIMS or medical colleges. Nursing in charge is the top role of the nursing staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: At Tantia University, all types of facilities are available like good Wi-Fi, well-organised and developed labs, well-accomplished classrooms, a knowledgeable library, etc. All things are great. The college provides very good and hygienic food. There is a well-organised mess. The food is very good and healthy.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college too much facilities are available and staff is too good .

review_content.Placements: At Tantia University, many courses are available. I'm a student of B.Sc. Nursing, and I pay a fee of 1,20,000 per year. Nursing is a four-year course, and each year there are lots of subjects as well as clinical duties in hospitals. In the 1st year, there are no clinical duties, only theoretical knowledge and practicals.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my faculty, there are 12 rooms which are separated into different departments, such as the computer lab, nursing practical lab, anatomy lab, and smart classes. The university hostel is wonderful; there are AC and non-AC rooms available, as well as single rooms. The charges depend on your choice.

review_summary.college_name: Tantia University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, good study environment, sport events, seminars.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in our batch, and all the students are very sharp-minded and good at curricular activities. Also, the top role of the course is job placement. After completing graduation, students get jobs easily and have more opportunities to gain knowledge about their surroundings.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is top-class. All the buildings are well-maintained and clean. Also, the food provided in the college hostel is very tasty and made with proper hygiene. The quality of the food is good. There are also sports facilities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very good university. And helpful.

content.Placements: In my university, there are about 4000 to 5000 students. Depending on the salaried courses, I have seen 10000 to 150000 in B.Sc. in private. There is a lot of demand for nursing and paramedical courses. 95% of the students have internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our university has all kinds of facilities available, such as libraries in every faculty, all AC classrooms, and smart screens. All quality is good. The hostel is very good, and the food at the hostel is also very good. There is also a medical facility. There are also sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The university is very good for students. It provides good facilities.

content.Placements: There are 60 students in one batch with at least 60% in 12th science. The salary offered to nursing staff is around Rs. 10,000-12,000 per month. The highest salary offered is Rs. 90,000 per month. The average salary offered to nursing staff is about Rs. 30,000-40,000 per month. AIIMS colleges are top recruiting companies for nursing professions. About 20-30% of students got internships at AIIMS or medical colleges. Nursing in charge is the top role of the nursing staff.
content.Infrastructure: At Tantia University, all types of facilities are available like good Wi-Fi, well-organised and developed labs, well-accomplished classrooms, a knowledgeable library, etc. All things are great. The college provides very good and hygienic food. There is a well-organised mess. The food is very good and healthy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college too much facilities are available and staff is too good .

content.Placements: At Tantia University, many courses are available. I'm a student of B.Sc. Nursing, and I pay a fee of 1,20,000 per year. Nursing is a four-year course, and each year there are lots of subjects as well as clinical duties in hospitals. In the 1st year, there are no clinical duties, only theoretical knowledge and practicals.
content.Infrastructure: In my faculty, there are 12 rooms which are separated into different departments, such as the computer lab, nursing practical lab, anatomy lab, and smart classes. The university hostel is wonderful; there are AC and non-AC rooms available, as well as single rooms. The charges depend on your choice.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma Medical Lab Technology (D.M.L.T.) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for my brother and Sister forever.

content.Placements: The placement conditions were excellent. The salary for staff nurses at entry level was from Rs. 24000 which was increase to Rs.50000 approximately, and the same of nursing officer was see a hike of about 20 to 25 thousand. Salary for freshers range 10 to 15 thousand rupees. The salaries may also see variations depending on the institutions that offer the job and the city too.
content.Infrastructure: The quality and performance of infrastructure for my course and hostel was outstanding. The classrooms were well ventilated, with proper seats and tables or furniture and other materials of the classroom. All the rooms were under CCTV surveillance. The library was well maintained with unique and different - different books and it also had many facilities. The food quality and taste of the products of the canteen was excellent. But there was no Wi- Fi facility in the college.

admission_overview.college_name: Tantia University Admission 2025 (Open): Eligibility, Fees, Dates & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Tantia University admissionsare merit-based for most of the courses. The university accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as NEET-UG and AIAPGET for specific courses. Besides,Tantia Universityalso conducts an entrance exam for admission to BAMS and PhD. TU offers UG, PG and doctoral level courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Interested candidates can apply online or submit the application form forTantia University admission.

Tantia University admission cycle begins at the start of the year. Candidates can apply online on the university website for their preferred course. Below are key Tantia University admission highlights:
Particulars
Tantia University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://www.tantiauniversity.com/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Tantia University offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below are topTantia University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 with Physics,ChemistryandBiologywith at least 50% aggregate
Minimum age should be 17 years

Tantia University fees for all these programmes include multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. In the total course fee, some components are paid annually, while some are one-time. Below isTantia University feefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Tantia University seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates after getting shortlisted need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Below is TU seat intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Tantia University admission processstarts with online registration. Candidates are selected based on merit in the last qualifying exam for most of the courses. Check below the step-wise admission process for TU:
STEP 1: Tantia University Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply online or collect the application form from the admission office of the campus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for the preferred course. The university has not specified a deadline for submitting applications for now. However, aspirants must apply as soon as possible to avoid rejections.
STEP 2: Selection

Tantia University selects candidates for MBBS and MD based onNEETandAIAPGETscores. Beside, the university also conducts an entrance exam for PhD and BAMS. For all other courses, the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam is considered admission.
STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation
After completion of the selection process, the university releases a merit list. Selected candidates are required to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Tantia University check out the below video:

But there was no Wi- Fi facility in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best and I recommend it to others.
reviews.review_text: University is placed in a scenic location and the building structure is also good. For every department or faculty we have a specific building. In my course, the classes were very large in size and projector was also there. In our wing a great library is located on 2nd floor and so many books are there and faculty had all labs like Physics lab, Chemistry lab, geography lab, computer lab etc. Gen sewa hospital is located in our campus and 5 cafés were also available in our university.

reviews.review_heading: It is the fastest emerging private medical college in Rajasthan with a government hospital.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel has Wi-Fi, the mess offers the best food, and students can have dessert every night after dinner. Each room is equipped with a 1.5-ton split air-conditioner. Rooms are spacious, and each room has a balcony due to which there is perfect cross ventilation in the room. There is a very big playground.

reviews.review_heading: I am very impressed by the facilities of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here. Labs and classrooms are well maintained. The hostel facility is nice, and very fresh food is available. A guard is available for safety, and the rooms are very neat and clean. On the campus, all facilities are provided. The mess is well maintained. Our college is overall nice.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because the faculty are very poor, and the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: There are many faculty members in our college, and the infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi is available, and the classrooms are pretty good. There is a small library, and it's okay. There are no labs for biology and chemistry. There are two hostels, one for boys and another for girls. The hostels provide very good food.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for B.Ed and good for students who don't attend college daily.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility in the hostels, but it is not available in classrooms. Classrooms are quite decent, and there are fans and good furniture in classrooms. Many times there is a shortage of books, and I did not see any labs in my entire 2 years. There is a canteen, and the food served in the canteen is quite expensive. I never played any game in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Best University of the city.
reviews.review_text:
1. Classrooms are having AC, projector, cameras, and a sitting capacity of 50-70 people. Labs are well-equipped and have lab manager/assistant who is very helpful when needed. Library has books as well as computers. 
2. Hostel is good with all types of facilities available. Warden is also co-operative. Mess and canteen are good and hygienic. Medical facilities are free/affordable for students as well as the public. College conducts sports events once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent Faculty but lacks in other fields.
reviews.review_text: Frankly speaking the infrastructure is not worthy of appreciation. Initially I faced so many difficulties but now I'm seeing improvement in the facilities provided. The Classrooms are well ventilated, with proper furniture. All the rooms are under CCTV surveillance. Speaking about library, it is well maintained with all the required books. To access internet we have to use desktop (computer). There is no Wi-Fi in the college. The food is awesome in canteen, no doubt in that but I sometimes go fo...

reviews.review_heading: Tantia University is the best university I ever seen. I am fully satisfied with this campus.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms on this campus are very clean and clear. We feel very comfortable and confident here, and there are many flowers and trees in the garden. The sports ground looks grassy, and we had enjoyed playing here. If we talk about connectivity, a very strong and fast Wi-Fi connection is available 24/7, and we can connect anytime when we needed the data connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to obtain a quality education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is great with all the labs and facilities. As I mentioned, all type of labs are present here, for example, anatomy, physiology, materia, etc. The classes here are well maintained and have projectors for the smart education. Labs are also well-managed here.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for B.Sc Nursing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really great as I have mentioned earlier. We practice in the hospital itself, but other than the hospital, we have a different building for our theory classes which are maintained properly with all the facilities like a projector and smart machines etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, Well ventilated classroom, well-equipped laboratory.

review_content.Placements: Last year 80% students got selected in campus interview and this year my senior got an offer letter from a company with a starting package of 5L per annum. I think the top recruiting company is TCS. The highest salary package is 5L, the lowest salary package is 12.5k and the average salary package is around 20k.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. We have well-equipped labs. Computer labs has good fiber net connection. Wi-Fi is available only in office. I'll give 3 out of 5 for the library, the library is big and it has more books but all the books are old edition books. I'm not in hostal but according to my friend who is in hostal, the hostal is nice but the food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities,

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed off-campus. Jobs are also offered in our college. The salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 4 LPA. Good companies visit our college. Wiseapp and Atos Syntel also come here. No internships are available in our college. Roles offered are trainee engineer and software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab equipment is good and the library is one of the best places in our college. But other facilities and infrastructure are not bad. Hostel food is sometimes poor and canteen food's not bad. Sports, medical facilities, and games are available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: We learn a lot from our professors.

review_content.Placements: Overall, 25 to 30 percent of students were placed in my class. About packages, they're very low compared to other nearby colleges, with a low cost of payment. Our college students were placed in CTS, TCS, and HCL. Many of my colleagues got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure: classrooms, practical labs, computer labs, libraries—all the needed stuff is good. Hostels are good, and the rooms are available for many students. There are separate areas for boys and girls. Foods are of good quality. More accessible transportation facilities are available.

review_summary.college_name: Jayaraj Annapackiam CSI College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My college life was very good for me. Because I got good friends and Staffs.

content.Placements: Students got placed in TCS, Centizen, Wipro and other top companies. Minimum package offered was INR 1.2 LPA and the highest was INR 2.5 LPA. Recently, HCL also visited our college to hire students. 5 students were selected for 6 months internship and then they were offered full time positions.
content.Infrastructure: Our college's infrastructure is good. The classrooms and labs are cleaned everyday by workers. A playground is also there. Students focus on sports as well because lots of opportunities are provided by the college. Mechanical labs are also very clean.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, Well ventilated classroom, well-equipped laboratory.

content.Placements: Last year 80% students got selected in campus interview and this year my senior got an offer letter from a company with a starting package of 5L per annum. I think the top recruiting company is TCS. The highest salary package is 5L, the lowest salary package is 12.5k and the average salary package is around 20k.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent. We have well-equipped labs. Computer labs has good fiber net connection. Wi-Fi is available only in office. I'll give 3 out of 5 for the library, the library is big and it has more books but all the books are old edition books. I'm not in hostal but according to my friend who is in hostal, the hostal is nice but the food is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities,

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed off-campus. Jobs are also offered in our college. The salary package offered ranges from 2 LPA - 4 LPA. Good companies visit our college. Wiseapp and Atos Syntel also come here. No internships are available in our college. Roles offered are trainee engineer and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Lab equipment is good and the library is one of the best places in our college. But other facilities and infrastructure are not bad. Hostel food is sometimes poor and canteen food's not bad. Sports, medical facilities, and games are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: We learn a lot from our professors.

content.Placements: Overall, 25 to 30 percent of students were placed in my class. About packages, they're very low compared to other nearby colleges, with a low cost of payment. Our college students were placed in CTS, TCS, and HCL. Many of my colleagues got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure: classrooms, practical labs, computer labs, libraries—all the needed stuff is good. Hostels are good, and the rooms are available for many students. There are separate areas for boys and girls. Foods are of good quality. More accessible transportation facilities are available.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does GIET College of Engineering offer to students?

faqs.answer: GIET College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

review_summary.college_name: GIET College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has 70% placement track and also it is in big area about 300 acres.

content.Placements: Placement is not up to the mark, there is no better placement option as per my point of view, but college prepare us to get the skills. But I hope the will be increase in upcoming years other than that every thing is okay. Placements quality is average in this college percentage of placement was 70%. The highest salary package was 6 LPA and average package was 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is nice for management students. It is proper for upcoming corporates. All the facilities are being provided and very professional infrastructure where a student will experience a good corporates environment. Toilets, classrooms and each rooms are well made and chair and tables if broken are replaced very quickly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the academic, environment, sports, etc. I strongly recommend joining this.

content.Placements: Around 35% of students were placed in our course. The top companies that recruited for our course are Wipro, TCS, Accenture, Emphasis, HCL, and Tech Mahindra. The top roles offered in our course are project engineer, intern, associate, and analyst. The highest package offered is INR 9 LPA, the average is INR 4 LPA, and the lowest is INR 3 LPA. 10% of students got internships from our course at Coditos and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: We have the best infrastructure at our college, i.e., we have unlimited Wi-Fi facilities surrounding the college, the library is the next big asset to talk about, and classrooms are simple and pleasant with air conditioning facilities and ventilation. The labs are outfitted with cutting-edge technology. The hostel was the best I have ever experienced, and the food provided is of the highest quality and healthy too. A hygienic canteen and well-maintained mess are the best to talk about. After academics, our college gives priority to sports at their best, and we got many prizes and medals representing our college.

individual_reviews.title: Very good choice if you are looking for place to enjoy and at same time shape your future .

content.Placements: More than 50% students gets campus placement. Companies like amazon tata reliance offer placements here. Package offered ranges from 6 Lacs to 30 lacks per annum. The college also help in finding internship programs. College also provide soft skills and other courses.
content.Infrastructure: Campus spread across more than 100 acers land. It consist of more than 8 colleges, Hostel and both North Indian and South Indian mess facilities for girls and boys. High technology labs. Gym and many other outdoor sports ground (football, cricket etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2015.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students pass, and 40% of them get placed in different companies. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is 3.5 LPA. TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., are the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities, and our college has a good infrastructure. Labs look good with enough equipment and optimal usage. Classrooms also look good. There is no Wi-Fi service.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Our course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the college bad infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am pursuing petroleum engineering for 3 rd year. Most candidates should maintain their 65% in their academics without any backlogs and are eligible for campus interviews. The highest package that one of my senior students placed in Infosys got 3.46 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have two campuses for engineering. Classrooms are good, with no Wi-Fi access to day scholar students. Even in the hostel students have Wi-Fi but average connectivity. Library maintenance is good in both the engineering campuses of GIER Autonomous and GITE affiliated to jntuk. Mess food is average and canteen food is normal.

faqs.question: How can I get into GIET College of Engineering for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
GIET College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at GIET College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by GIET College of Engineering is up to 480. Good thing to know is that GIET College of Engineering has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

description: GIET College of Engineering cutoff 2025 has been released based on AP ICET entrance scores. The cutoff varied based on categories, quotas and gender. Candidates can check out the sections below to know about the GIET College of Engineering 2025 cutoff across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. More updates are provided below:

With the release of the final round cutoff list, the GIET College of Engineering AP EAMCET cutoff 2024 came to an end. The cutoff was concluded in a few rounds for different categories of students belonging to the Home State quota. The AP EAMCET cutoff was released for admission to B.E. / B.Tech course. Considering the last round of GIET College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2024, the most challenging specialisations were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence

In the table given below, students can find out the AP EAMCET category-wise, round-wise and branch-wise cutoff data for the past three years. As per the 2024 cutoff list, the last round closing ranks for B.E. / B.Tech admission was between 42106 and 49177. The most in-demand B.E. / B.Tech specialisation among the General HS category was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning).
GIET College of Engineering accepts AP EAMCET ranks for admission to the BTech course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out some of the important dates related to the AP EAMCET.

GIET College of Engineering Seat Allotment for AP EAPCET has been concluded. Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) holds AP EAMCET exam counselling to fill open seats in BTech, BPharm, and BSc agriculture, Bachelor in Fisheries, and Bachelor in Horticulture programmes. hostel_campus.college_name: GIET College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has 70% placement track and also it is in big area about 300 acres.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is nice for management students. It is proper for upcoming corporates. All the facilities are being provided and very professional infrastructure where a student will experience a good corporates environment. Toilets, classrooms and each rooms are well made and chair and tables if broken are replaced very quickly.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the academic, environment, sports, etc. I strongly recommend joining this.
reviews.review_text:
We have the best infrastructure at our college, i.e., we have unlimited Wi-Fi facilities surrounding the college, the library is the next big asset to talk about, and classrooms are simple and pleasant with air conditioning facilities and ventilation. The labs are outfitted with cutting-edge technology. The hostel was the best I have ever experienced, and the food provided is of the highest quality and healthy too. A hygienic canteen and well-maintained mess are the best to talk about.
After aca...

reviews.review_heading: Very good choice if you are looking for place to enjoy and at same time shape your future .
reviews.review_text: Campus spread across more than 100 acers land. It consist of more than 8 colleges, Hostel and both North Indian and South Indian mess facilities for girls and boys. High technology labs. Gym and many other outdoor sports ground (football, cricket etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities, and our college has a good infrastructure. Labs look good with enough equipment and optimal usage. Classrooms also look good. There is no Wi-Fi service.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the college bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have two campuses for engineering. Classrooms are good, with no Wi-Fi access to day scholar students. Even in the hostel students have Wi-Fi but average connectivity. Library maintenance is good in both the engineering campuses of GIER Autonomous and GITE affiliated to jntuk. Mess food is average and canteen food is normal.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GIET College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like a library and computer labs that are very useful to us. I am very thankful to my teachers and faculty, who made me better in every aspect of my studies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GIET College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like a library and computer labs that are very useful to us. I am very thankful to my teachers and faculty, who made me better in every aspect of my studies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GIET College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like a library and computer labs which are very useful to us. I am very much thankful to my teachers and faculty, who made me better in every aspect of my studies.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest not to prefer this college.
reviews.review_text: We didn't have any labs for our core subjects. Classrooms were good, but departments don't even have proper washrooms. The library was good. We had games only in the 1st year. The canteen was good. Wi-Fi was provided here, but it wasn't that good. Medical facilities were good too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good infrastructure, facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure in our department. We have Wi-Fi, and petroleum core subject labs are available. There is high-cost equipment in our labs. Classrooms are good, and the library is huge and good. Hostel facility is also available. The quality of the food served is good. Medical facilities and Wi-Fi are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and facilities. I am dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all labs, classrooms and a library. The infrastructure of our college is good. The department of people is taking care of the facilities. Facilities available in our hostel is fantastic. Quality of food served is good. Our college provides a good ground for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: GIET college is good to gain knowledge and also for good campus placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is quite good but not very good, but they provide all the facilities for students according to their needs. For students of all the branches, they will provide god lab facilities and good teachers. In the lab, everything is good for mechanical, computers and electrical branch. This college provides everything for students which they need.

reviews.review_heading: It is not that good to study civil engineering at GIET College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: For the civil branch, there are no facilities. Students are taken to another college for using equipment of civil labs. Quality of the hostel is nice, and the food is served in the hostel is healthy and hygiene. Special mention for sports because they encourage you for cricket and tennis. The canteen offers a lot of Chinese and Indian, which is not hygienic and these are called as CFC, i.e., Central Food Court.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text: There are extremely good facilities like classrooms, labs,  and a library. But I faced some problems regarding drinking water, so please provide the water in each classroom. I don't know about the hostel because I am a day scholar. Sports and games were good.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is good and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good enough and lectures are done in classrooms only For practice of course labs are available and the comfort is good in labs to perform the content clear and nice The faculty intentions are good towards students and quality of food is nice.
